title: May 11, 2022: Nutrition Science Advisory Committee: Agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Nutrition Science Advisory Committee (NSAC): Sixth Meeting Agenda
- Review and approve the Record of Proceedings from the fifth meeting.
- Discuss and provide advice on Applying the Evidence Review Cycle for Dietary Guidance to Infant
    Nutrition
- Propose forward plan and seek Committee members’ approval
Welcome & Declarations of Affiliations and
        Interests Lead: NSAC Co-Chairs
Approval of Record of Proceedings from Fifth
        Meeting Lead: NSAC Co-Chairs
Applying the Evidence Review Cycle for Dietary
        Guidance to Infant Nutrition Presenter: Jennifer McCrea, Office of Nutrition
        Policy and Promotion, Health Canada
Focused Discussion: Applying the Evidence Review Cycle for Dietary
        Guidance (ERC) to Infant Nutrition—Specific
        Questions Lead: NSAC Co-Chairs
Focused Discussion: Moving Forward in 2022-2023 Lead: NSAC Co-Chairs & Health Canada
Closing Remarks Lead: NSAC Co-Chairs
